title: RL reward-equivalent PPO/SAC/TD3 sweep
thesis_relevance: Stable-Baselines3 PPO, SAC, and TD3 comparison using the same TM2D environment, AABB lidar, strict gas/brake/steer actions, and a scalarized equivalent of the GA tuple.
interpretation: Only PPO learned to finish in this screening. SAC and TD3 were useful negative comparisons under the tested setup; GA remains the stronger practical baseline.
